material_details.material_description: Silver is a soft, white, lustrous transition metal. It possesses the highest electrical conductivity, thermal conductivity, and reflectivity of any metal. It is highly ductile and malleable, making it easy to work with. As a precious metal, it is valued for its beauty and scarcity, and it has antimicrobial properties.
